scripts.analyze: pnpm run build:analyze && pnpm run analyze:top
scripts.build:ci: pnpm run build && pnpm run check:css-budget
scripts.check:all: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build:ci && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build:ci && pnpm exec playwright test
scripts.test:visual: pnpm run build:ci && pnpm exec playwright test e2e/visual-regression.spec.ts
scripts.ci: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build:ci
scripts.test:e2e:docker: docker run --rm -t -e CI=1 -e PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_MODE=preview -v "$(pwd)/..":/work -w /work -v miniapp_node_modules:/work/miniapp/node_modules -v shared_node_modules:/work/shared/node_modules -v frontend_node_modules:/work/node_modules -v pnpm_store:/pnpm-store mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.58.2-noble bash -lc "npm i -g pnpm@9 && pnpm config set store-dir /pnpm-store && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --force && pnpm -C miniapp run build && pnpm -C miniapp exec playwright test"
